headline: Keep the same $19,301 weekly budget, pull dollars out of facebook, and push them into search for a modeled +$20,468 lift.

recommendations.reasoning: Cut from $3,757 to $2,271. Facebook is saturated and the modeled delta at the lower spend is -$71,441.
Hold at $0. OOH stays frozen because the signal is weak, so the optimizer leaves it unchanged.
Hold at $10,384. Print stays frozen because the signal is weak, so the optimizer leaves it unchanged.
Raise from $5,160 to $6,646. Search still carries 61.6 marginal ROAS there and adds +$91,909 in modeled revenue.
Hold at $0. TV is near optimum at the current allocation, so the optimizer does not move budget into it.
